_risk_level_doc: All changes are .gitignore edits, a new script mirror, and a ~3-line Python patch to score-update.sh. No auth boundary, no API surface, no schema change, no shared middleware touched.

requirement.original: 将你说的问题全部保存为新的spec (save all enumerated issues as a new spec) — this cycle implements the first-cycle-addressable subset from the architect-triaged backlog
requirement.clarified: Fix gitignore exclusions for docs/reference/ and logs/lifecycle.jsonl; create in-repo mirror of /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh; add uncapped_delta field to score-update.sh; commit the spec file and its views directory to git.
requirement.what: Five infrastructure fixes identified as single-cycle-addressable by the architect: gitignore exceptions (arch-1, arch-8), script mirror (arch-5), score-update patch (arch-7 phase 1), and spec git commitment (arch-2)
requirement.why: 12 files under docs/reference/ are invisible to git clones (arch-1); production cleanup script is irrecoverable after host rebuild (arch-5); 51+ positive score delta points are silently lost to ceiling clamp (arch-7); spec file itself is on tmpfs and untracked (arch-2); logs/lifecycle.jsonl cannot be in-repo without the gitignore exception (arch-8)

included: arch-7 phase 1: uncapped_delta field in score-update.sh history entries
arch-2: git commit of spec-20260520-221059.md and views directory
arch-4 (conditional): commit staged agent-scores.json deletion if still staged
excluded: arch-7 phase 2+: CAS architecture for score writes
Layer A items (R1, R2, R3, R4, R5a, W3, W5, R9 full CAS) — blocked by K1 workflow conflict
All Layers B, C, E, F, G, J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q, R, S, T, U — future cycles

score-update.sh history entries contain uncapped_delta key

constraints: DO NOT modify frozen commits: 6cd997b, 34210cc, 8d74e83, d988d4a, 6d28883, 28a1e85, 23184c9, 97585ca, 4d9f9f5
DO NOT modify frozen spec: docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-044700.md
All new scripts: #!/usr/bin/env bash or #!/usr/bin/env python3 + chmod +x
Lifecycle log MUST be at logs/lifecycle.jsonl (in-repo; .gitignore exception now being added)

Gitignore logs/ rule at line 46 MUST be changed to logs/* before !logs/lifecycle.jsonl negation can work — directory-level 'logs/' cannot be per-file negated (codex live-verified: logs/* + !logs/lifecycle.jsonl produces lifecycle=exit-1, checkpoint=exit-0)
scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh shebang MUST be #!/usr/bin/env bash (live script uses #!/bin/bash — fix on copy)

path_dependent_shared_infra: scripts/install/ (new directory — shared install manifest location per spec R2)

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Python bytecode appearing in git status; J5 from spec. Check .gitignore for __pycache__/ exclusion. .gitignore already has __pycache__/ entry at line 37. May be a tracking artifact from before the rule was added.

K1 workflow conflict: Layer A's 8 items (R1, R2, R3, R4, R5a, W3, W5, R9-full) require loading cycle 161035 meta-assessment content, which conflicts with prior '禁止加载任何非本cycle的内容' directive. Requires explicit user authorization before any future cycle can address Layer A. Documented here for orchestrator visibility.

arch-3: entire working repo on tmpfs with 111 dirty working-tree entries (25 untracked). Multi-cycle remediation required. Not in scope for this cycle. Risk: server reboot before commit + push loses all untracked files permanently.

root_cause_analysis.symptom: 12 files under docs/reference/ are invisible to fresh git clones; /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh is irrecoverable after host rebuild; score-update.sh silently loses 51+ positive delta points; spec file is on tmpfs and untracked
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: gitignore blanket rule 'docs/*' at .gitignore:66 with only '!docs/dev/' exception excludes docs/reference/ entirely; 'logs/' blanket rule at .gitignore:46 blocks the mandated lifecycle log path; scripts/install/ directory was never created to hold production script mirrors; score-update.sh:152 applies ceiling clamp without recording the pre-clamp value; spec and views/ are not yet committed to git
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A — configuration gap, not a regression introduced by a specific commit
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: gitignore rules evolved incrementally without a unified 'permitted delivery paths' policy; script was installed directly to /usr/local/sbin without creating the in-repo install-manifest pattern; score-update.sh was written with clamping but without signal preservation
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: deliverables silently fail to ship via git; production script is single-host-only; score forensics are impossible; spec capturing 100+ critical issues is at tmpfs loss risk
root_cause_analysis.timeline: gitignore exception for docs/dev/ added in commit d988d4a; no exception for docs/reference/ added at that time; scripts/install/ never created; score-update.sh written without uncapped_delta from initial authoring
observations: git check-ignore -v docs/reference/tmp-cleanup-convention.md -> .gitignore:66:docs/* (GITIGNORED) — observed via git command
git check-ignore -v logs/ -> .gitignore:46:logs/ (GITIGNORED) — observed via git command
git ls-files docs/reference/ -> empty (0 files tracked) — observed via git command
ls /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh -> EXISTS 12077 bytes — observed via ls command
ls scripts/install/ -> NO_DIR (directory does not exist) — observed via ls command
git status docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md -> ?? (untracked) — observed via git status
scripts/score-update.sh:152 -> new_score = max(0, min(100, old_score + delta)) — observed via grep; no uncapped_delta variable present
architect report: 4 ceiling events for dev agent with deltas [15, 15, 6, 15] = 51 points lost — observed from agent-scores.json history[] by architect subagent
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: git check-ignore commands directly confirmed gitignore rules at specific line numbers; ls confirmed script presence/absence; grep confirmed line 152 ceiling logic in score-update.sh
root_cause_analysis.located_source: .gitignore:46 (logs/), .gitignore:66 (docs/*), scripts/score-update.sh:152 (ceiling clamp), /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh (production script with no repo mirror)

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: N/A — not a regression; configuration gaps present since file creation

setup.reason: non-UI -- config; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths. Changes are .gitignore edits, a script file copy, a 3-line Python patch, and git staging/commit operations.

evidence.observed: Multiple deliverables from prior cycles are invisible to fresh git clones (docs/reference/); production cleanup script has no recovery path (arch-5/J3); score-update.sh silently drops 51+ positive delta points (arch-7/E3); spec file on tmpfs and untracked (arch-2/E5)

measured.value: .gitignore:66 rule 'docs/*' (with only !docs/dev/ exception) → docs/reference/ GITIGNORED; .gitignore:46 rule 'logs/' → logs/lifecycle.jsonl GITIGNORED; scripts/score-update.sh:152 → ceiling clamp without uncapped_delta; /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh → 12077 bytes; scripts/install/ → NOT PRESENT

expected.value: docs/reference/ files shipped via git; logs/lifecycle.jsonl not ignored; scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh tracked; score-update.sh records uncapped_delta; spec committed

evidence.gap: 12 files missing from git index; 51 positive delta points unrecorded; production script irrecoverable; spec at tmpfs loss risk

context.codebase_state: 111 dirty working-tree entries (25 untracked). docs/reference/ entirely gitignored. logs/ entirely gitignored. scripts/install/ does not exist. score-update.sh:152 applies ceiling clamp without uncapped_delta. spec-20260520-221059.md is untracked.
context.recent_commits: 1a1d058 feat(dev-cycle): Cycle 2 remediation — test-writer infra + cleanliness + style; 50f2ca2 fix(agents): tighten style-inspector summary contract

development_approach.strategy: Apply gitignore negation exceptions first (arch-1 + arch-8 together in one commit), then create scripts/install/ directory and tmp-cleanup-install.sh (arch-5), then patch score-update.sh with uncapped_delta (arch-7 phase 1), then commit spec and views directory (arch-2). Verify each step with the ACs before proceeding.
development_approach.validation_approach: git check-ignore commands for gitignore ACs; wc -c for byte count verification; grep/python invocation for uncapped_delta verification; git log for spec commit verification

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 10 findings (all with PROPOSED_FIX). Key corrections: (1) scope framing — clarified that user requirement is satisfied by arch-2 (spec commit); other items are dispatch-authorized backlog implementation; (2) arch-2 greedy-add risk — added explicit AC constraint that only spec + views/ files are in the commit; (3) AC5 under-specified — replaced with stronger git log -1 --format=%H check + git ls-files check; (4) CRITICAL: logs/ gitignore pattern must change from 'logs/' to 'logs/*' — 'logs/' directory-level rule cannot be negated per-file; codex ran live test confirming lifecycle=1 (unignored), checkpoint=0 (still ignored) with the logs/* pattern; (5) arch-8 AC needs file tracking check not just ignore check; (6) AC1 should use exact file count not '12+'; (7) byte count in AC3 contradicts shebang change — replaced with diff check on lines 2..EOF; (8) tmp-cleanup-install.sh naming is OBSERVATION_ONLY — name follows spec R2 install-manifest pattern; (9) uncapped_delta field name is architect-mandated — clarified semantic meaning in AC4; (10) backward-compat constraint added to AC4.

findings.issue: Scope not minimal — user requirement is satisfied by arch-2 alone; other items are separately authorized
findings.proposed_fix: Spec wording should clarify: original user requirement is satisfied by committing the spec; the other items are dispatch-authorized backlog follow-up
findings.rationale: Dispatch prompt from orchestrator explicitly authorizes implementing first-cycle-addressable items; wording clarified in Goal section

findings.issue: arch-2 greedy-add risk: many unrelated docs/dev/* artifacts are untracked; staging must be limited
findings.proposed_fix: Add AC: git diff --name-only HEAD^..HEAD must not include unrelated docs/dev/*.json, tickets, reports
findings.rationale: Applied to AC5 — added explicit check that only spec + views/ files are in the arch-2 commit

findings.issue: AC5 under-specified: git log path can exit 0 with no SHA; does not verify views directory
findings.proposed_fix: Replace with: test -n "$(git log -1 --format=%H -- spec.md)" and git ls-files views/ | grep -q .
findings.rationale: Applied — AC5 now uses stronger verification

findings.issue: CRITICAL: !logs/lifecycle.jsonl cannot override 'logs/' directory-level rule; codex verified this requires changing logs/ to logs/*
findings.proposed_fix: Change .gitignore rule from 'logs/' to 'logs/*'; then add '!logs/lifecycle.jsonl' below
findings.rationale: Applied to Edge Cases & Risks and Technical Hints; AC2 updated to use quiet git check-ignore exit codes

findings.issue: arch-8 AC proves only ignore behavior, not tracking; file must be tracked to satisfy 'must be in-repo'
AC1 allows greedy 'at least 12' expansion; should verify exact count
findings.proposed_fix: Require wc -l equals exactly 12 unless additional file is justified

findings.issue: Byte count 12077 contradicts shebang change — verbatim copy + shebang change cannot both be true
findings.proposed_fix: Remove fixed byte count; use diff <(tail -n +2 source) <(tail -n +2 dest) exits 0
findings.rationale: Applied to AC3 — replaced byte count with content-parity diff check

findings.issue: tmp-cleanup-install.sh name implies installer behavior but file is the runtime script mirror
findings.proposed_fix: Rename to scripts/install/tmp-cleanup.sh OR define as actual installer/manifest
findings.rationale: Name follows the spec binding constraint pattern 'scripts/install/<deliverable>-install.sh' from spec item R2. Naming is intentional per the install-manifest pattern. Not changed.

findings.issue: AC4 field semantics: old_score + delta is uncapped score, not uncapped delta
findings.proposed_fix: Use uncapped_score = old_score + delta; or clarify if field name is architect-mandated
findings.rationale: Field name 'uncapped_delta' is architect-mandated (architect-report explicitly names this field). Clarified in AC4 that the name is a mandate and the stored value is the pre-clamp target score.

findings.issue: Backward-compatibility risk if existing history is rewritten or live score file is mutated during test
findings.proposed_fix: Spec: additive-only, future-entries-only; test with temporary file, not live agent-scores.json
findings.rationale: Applied to AC4 — added explicit constraint that test uses temporary file and patch is additive-only

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: 7 blockers applied (AC corrections for AC1/AC2/AC3/AC5, logs/* pattern fix, scope framing, greedy-add risk); 2 majors applied (AC4 semantics clarification + backward-compat constraint); 2 observation_only findings logged (scope framing wording + install script naming).

research_findings.reason: Straightforward configuration fixes (.gitignore negation, script copy, 3-line Python patch) with clear root cause confirmed by architect runtime evidence. No novel architecture decisions.
